intel.title: [CISA KEV] Microsoft SharePoint - Microsoft SharePoint Deserialization of Untrusted Data Vulnerability
intel.raw_content:
CVE: CVE-2026-58644
廠商: Microsoft
產品: SharePoint
漏洞名稱: Microsoft SharePoint Deserialization of Untrusted Data Vulnerability
說明: Microsoft SharePoint contains a deserialization of untrusted data vulnerability that allows an unauthorized attacker to execute code over a network.
CISA 要求措施: Apply mitigations in accordance with vendor instructions, ensuring compliance with CISA’s BOD 26-04 Prioritizing Security Updates Based on Risk (see URL in Notes) guidance and CISA’s “Forensics Triage Requirements” (see URL in Notes). Follow applicable BOD 26-04 guidance for cloud services or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable. Stakeholders are responsible for evaluating each asset's internet exposure and ensuring adherence to BOD 26-04 patching guidelines.
修補截止日: 2026-07-19
已知勒索軟體利用: Unknown

analysis.summary: Microsoft SharePoint 存在反序列化漏洞（CVE-2026-58644），允許未授權的遠端攻擊者執行任意程式碼（RCE）。此漏洞已被列入 CISA KEV，顯示已有在野利用，但由於本公司並未部署或使用 Microsoft SharePoint，因此不受此漏洞影響。
analysis.recommendation: 公司資產清冊未包含受影響資產，無需處置。

intel.title: [CISA KEV] Fortinet FortiSandbox - Fortinet FortiSandbox OS Command Injection Vulnerability
intel.raw_content:
CVE: CVE-2026-25089
廠商: Fortinet
產品: FortiSandbox
漏洞名稱: Fortinet FortiSandbox OS Command Injection Vulnerability
說明: Fortinet FortiSandbox, FortiSandbox Cloud, and FortiSandbox PaaS contain an OS command injection vulnerability that allows an unauthenticated attacker to execute unauthorized commands via specifically crafted HTTP requests.
CISA 要求措施: Apply mitigations in accordance with vendor instructions, ensuring compliance with CISA’s BOD 26-04 Prioritizing Security Updates Based on Risk (see URL in Notes) guidance and CISA’s “Forensics Triage Requirements” (see URL in Notes). Follow applicable BOD 26-04 guidance for cloud services or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable. Stakeholders are responsible for evaluating each asset's internet exposure and ensuring adherence to BOD 26-04 patching guidelines.
修補截止日: 2026-07-19
已知勒索軟體利用: Unknown

analysis.summary: Fortinet FortiSandbox 存在 OS 命令注入漏洞（CVE-2026-25089），允許未授權的攻擊者透過特製的 HTTP 請求執行任意系統命令。經比對公司資產清冊，本公司並未使用該受影響產品，無直接安全風險。
analysis.recommendation: 公司資產清冊未包含受影響資產，無需處置。

intel.title: [CISA KEV] Fortinet FortiSandbox - Fortinet FortiSandbox OS Command Injection Vulnerability
intel.raw_content:
CVE: CVE-2026-39808
廠商: Fortinet
產品: FortiSandbox
漏洞名稱: Fortinet FortiSandbox OS Command Injection Vulnerability
說明: Fortinet FortiSandbox contains an OS command injection vulnerability that could allow an unauthenticated attacker to execute unauthorized code or commands via crafted HTTP requests.
CISA 要求措施: Apply mitigations in accordance with vendor instructions, ensuring compliance with CISA’s BOD 26-04 Prioritizing Security Updates Based on Risk (see URL in Notes) guidance and CISA’s “Forensics Triage Requirements” (see URL in Notes). Follow applicable BOD 26-04 guidance for cloud services or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable. Stakeholders are responsible for evaluating each asset's internet exposure and ensuring adherence to BOD 26-04 patching guidelines.
修補截止日: 2026-07-19
已知勒索軟體利用: Unknown

analysis.summary: Fortinet FortiSandbox 存在作業系統指令注入漏洞（CVE-2026-39808），已被 CISA 列入已知利用漏洞清單（KEV）。遠端且未經授權的攻擊者可透過發送特製的 HTTP 請求，在系統上執行任意指令或代碼。
analysis.recommendation: 公司資產清冊未包含受影響資產，無需處置。
